Polk County Fire Rescue to approve new Delta shift schedule to reduce hours, overtime
summary: Polk County Fire Rescue and its union reached a tentative agreement Tuesday to launch a new scheduling shift designed to improve work-life balance for local firefighters.

title: Clearwater Duke Energy deal: City council clears first vote on 30-year contract
summary: Clearwater city leaders voted unanimously Thursday to advance a 30-year franchise contract with Duke Energy, choosing corporate power over a proposed public alternative.

title: President Donald Trump claims new documents show widespread vulnerabilities in US election security
summary: On Thursday, President Trump said he would declassify documents that showed a history of security threats and foreign influence aimed at U.S. elections. Scripps News is reviewing the documents.

title: Duke Energy's future looking bright in Clearwater following unanimous City Council vote
summary: After a unanimous vote in favor of Duke Energy's new 30-year agreement with the City of Clearwater, the deal now heads for a second reading despite public pushback Thursday evening.

title: Church pastor describes gunshots after 2 Hillsborough County deputies were shot
summary: A pastor at a church in Ruskin described hearing the gunfire after the Hillsborough County Sheriff's Office said a suspect shot two deputies on Thursday.
